articles.title: Giannis Antetokounmpo paid high praise to Celtics’ coach Joe Mazzulla
articles.description:
"It’s about the mentality that you instilled in your place.”

The post Giannis Antetokounmpo paid high praise to Celtics’ coach Joe Mazzulla appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Giannis Antetokounmpo praised Celtics coach Joe Mazzulla for his impactful mentality.
Mazzulla's coaching has significantly influenced the Celtics' performance this season.
Boston residents can expect a stronger Celtics team under Mazzulla's leadership.

articles.title: Person seriously injured in fall at Firefighting Academy facility

Local emergency services responded, highlighting safety concerns for training environments.

articles.title: Trump warns a ‘whole civilization will die tonight’ if a deal with Iran isn’t reached
articles.description:
Since the war began, Trump has repeatedly imposed deadlines linked to threats, only to extend them. But the president insisted this one is final and will expire at 8 p.m. in Washington without a major diplomatic breakthrough.

The post Trump warns a ‘whole civilization will die tonight’ if a deal with Iran isn’t reached appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Trump sets a final deadline of 8 p.m. for Iran deal negotiations.
Warnings of severe consequences could affect Boston's diplomatic community.
Local residents may face heightened tensions and uncertainty in international relations.

articles.title: American journalist Shelly Kittleson has been released, an Iraqi official tells the AP
articles.description:
American journalist Shelly Kittleson, who was kidnapped in Baghdad last week, has been released

summary: American journalist Shelly Kittleson was released after being kidnapped in Baghdad last week.
